Keynote Speaker, Dave Delaney

Communication isn’t a soft skill.

It’s a superpower!

Communication keynote presentations that leave audiences enlightened, empowered, and entertained. Acclaimed keynote speaker Dave Delaney helps leaders and teams build clarity, connection, and confidence through The Communication Edge and The ADHD Advantage, delivered with storytelling, humor, and practical tools audiences use immediately.

Check Availability Workshops Also Available

Dave Delaney 2026/2027 Keynote Presentations

The Communication Edge

AI can write the email. It can't have the conversation.

In an era when AI handles routine tasks, human communication is the competitive advantage. The Communication Edge helps leaders and teams cut through friction, have the conversations that matter, and communicate with the clarity, confidence, and impact that drives real results.

As artificial intelligence takes over more of the routine work, the skills that remain distinctly human — trust, presence, difficult conversations, and genuine connection — are becoming the new competitive advantage. Teams retreat into silos. Hard conversations get replaced with polite agreement. Good intentions quietly create turnover, missed opportunities, and cultures where nobody says what they actually mean.

In this high-energy, interactive keynote, Dave Delaney reveals the two words that change everything and teaches audiences the exact frameworks they'll use the moment they walk out the door.

Time: 45–60 minutes

Ideal for: Company culture, leadership development, employee retention, sales teams, professional associations, and any organization navigating the future of work.

Optional add-on: The Communication Edge Workshop (90–180 minutes) as a breakout or half-day session.

Bonus: A free digital cheat sheet so attendees can revisit the key tools after the event.

What audiences will learn…

Drawing on his original NICE, AND framework and the L.I.S.T.E.N. method, Dave shows audiences how to communicate more effectively across generations, departments, and roles in an increasingly AI-assisted workplace where human communication is no longer a soft skill. It's the edge.

Key Takeaways:

  • A simple, immediately applicable language shift that replaces team friction with forward momentum
  • The L.I.S.T.E.N. framework for becoming a more present, effective communicator in any conversation
  • Practical tools for navigating difficult conversations, bridging silos, and building real trust

The ADHD Advantage

Unlocking Strengths in Work and Life. Featuring The Root Down Framework.

The ADHD Advantage, inspired by Dave Delaney's TEDx Talk, helps organizations recognize, support, and unlock neurodiverse strengths — featuring Dave Delaney's Root Down Framework: Know, Respect, and Connect Yourself.

Most organizations have more untapped potential than they realize, and much of it lies in people who've spent their careers being told they're too much, not enough, or just wired wrong. Diagnosed with ADHD at fifty, Dave Delaney brings a funny, honest, and deeply human take on what ADHD actually looks like and what organizations gain when they stop managing neurodiversity and start unleashing it.

Time: 45–60 minutes (or customize for your agenda)

Ideal for: Leadership and professional development conferences, corporate retreats and off-sites, ERG and SIG programs, mental health and wellness events, universities and learning organizations.

Bonus: A simple take-home tool attendees can use to reinforce the Root Down Framework after the event.

What audiences will learn…

Key takeaways (Root Down Framework):

  • Know Yourself: Identify your strengths and channel them into confidence and results
  • Respect Yourself: Build the self-acceptance that fuels resilience, reduces burnout, and unlocks growth
  • Connect Yourself: Practical strategies for reducing disconnection and building belonging at work and beyond

What to expect

Enlighten

Your audience will come away with new ideas and fresh perspectives to improve communication with colleagues, clients, prospects, and peers.

Empower

Your group will feel invigorated and excited to apply the tactics and strategies they discover immediately.

Entertain

Expect plenty of laughter and nods of agreement as your people enjoy Dave Delaney's high-energy, interactive presentations.

Let's Create a Meaningful Experience for Your Group

Ideal for conferences, leadership events, professional development programs, and organizations investing in better communication. Typical response time: 1 business day. No obligation. No hard sell.

“Communication isn’t a soft skill. It’s a superpower.”

— Dave Delaney, powered by Futureforth.

  • Coaching

  • Contact

Dave Delaney is an internationally recognized keynote speaker, leadership consultant, and communication strategist. As the founder of Futureforth, he works with organizations to improve employee retention, build inclusive workplace cultures, and enhance communication across hybrid, remote, and in-person teams. He speaks on topics such as neurodiversity in leadership, modern communication strategies, and connection-driven team building.

Nashville, TN, USA
